log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:6+9=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 30 damage. Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 37/67
Frost Giant attacks Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:11+9=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 18/67
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:15+3=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician.
→ Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician healed for 7 HP. HP: 25/67
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:11+9=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 3/67
→ Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 8 vs DC 11]
Frost Giant attacks Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 10 damage. Earth Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
